Cold Stimulation Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/cold-stimulation-test/ 
Cold Stimulation Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a cold stimulation test? 
A cold stimulation test involves placing your fingers in ice water and checking to see how long it takes your skin to return to a normal temperature. This test is used to find out if you have Raynaud phenomenon . Raynaud phenomenon, also known as Raynaud disease or Raynaud syndrome, is a condition that causes brief episodes or "atta
